rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Elec. Code §271.003, which governs common polling place locations in joint elections. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 271.003. LOCATION OF COMMON POLLING PLACE. (a) A regular county polling place may be used for a common polling place in a joint election.
_note: Rule text concerns election polling place locations; no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
